branding.name: The Groove Kit
branding.description: An interactive music education platform designed for drummers, percussionists, and rhythm enthusiasts of all skill levels.

features.name: Rhythm Circles
features.description: A circular beat sequencer inspired by BeatScholar. Create patterns using pizza-slice subdivisions with 4 drum kits.

features.name: Pro Metronome
features.description: Professional-grade metronome with accent patterns, subdivisions, tempo ramp, rhythm trainer, and practice timer.

features.name: MIDI Library
features.description: Upload and visualize MIDI files with a piano roll editor. Play back with synthesized instruments, mute/solo tracks.

features.name: Chord Lab
features.description: Browse 143 chord progressions with playback and key transposition. From ii-V-I to 12-bar blues.

features.name: The Real Book
features.description: 99 jazz standards with chord charts, backing tracks, and practice tools for aspiring jazz musicians.

features.name: Live Sessions
features.description: Host synchronized practice sessions for classrooms. Share a room code and control what everyone hears.

features.name: Genre Map
features.description: Explore genres on a 2D map from Straight to Swung, Simple to Complex. Discover loops by genre.

features.name: Groove Match
features.description: Find loops that groove together — matched by time signature, BPM, and feel.

jazz.name: Jazz Acoustic
jazz.description: Warmer tones, longer sustain, more dynamic range

rock.name: Rock Studio
rock.description: Punchier attack, compressed feel, powerful kicks

808.name: 808 Electronic
808.description: Deep sub kick, sharp clap, crispy hi-hats
